title: Render-only (0-tick) fuzz frames advance SFX voices, leaking audio cadence into hashed ChrRecord.ptr_SEbuffer* (uncap purity gate RED on levels 22/24 post-FID-0014)
repro: LEVELS='22 24' tools/uncap_purity_gate.sh (mode=full); vanilla vs GE007_UNCAP_FUZZ diverge in region pool at ChrRecord.ptr_SEbuffer1

history.note: Found by FID-0033 full uncap_purity_gate.sh (FID-0014 quick run 33/9/24 skipped 22/24); exposed not introduced by FID-0014. Report docs/fidelity/reports/verify_fb9beceae183_uncap_purity_gate_2.log

3-way pool dump (van/van/fuzz minus ASLR) => exactly one divergent word at ChrRecord+0x1b0 = ptr_SEbuffer1 (offsetof confirms; sizeof(ChrRecord)=568=stride). NULLed by sndDisposeSound (snd.c:602) when the guard gunshot voice finishes; voice advanced by portAudioFrame (platform_sdl.c) per loop iteration incl. render-only frames. FID-0014 evals byte-identical (3496/3496); GE007_NO_PATROL_MAGIC_FIX=1 => fuzz byte-pure.

Fix: skip portAudioFrame() on render-only (0-tick) frames (g_pcUncapRenderOnlyFrame). Default ON; GE007_NO_UNCAP_AUDIO_FIX=1 negative control. No-op in normal play (flag armed only by --deterministic fuzz harness).

Fix landed (platform_sdl.c skip portAudioFrame on 0-tick frames; default ON, GE007_NO_UNCAP_AUDIO_FIX=1 negative control). Proof: lvl22 seed1337/4242 fix-ON 6/6 GREEN (770360a2/matched vanilla) vs fix-OFF DETERMINISTIC bug (seed1337 4c1e45bd, seed4242 dc61cb8c) => fail-on-revert both seeds; lvl24 both seeds GREEN; lvl9/33 GREEN; tape_regression 7/7 byte-exact (isolated); port_patrol_magic_profile_smoke PASS both polarities. Residual rare frame-timing schedule-shift flake (a30bd21e ~1/13) is pre-existing (fix-OFF identical osGetCount timing), documented derivation §6.

Ran uncap_purity_gate.sh LEVELS='22 24' (2 seeds, Release ge007+ROM). Fix-ON DEFAULT: levels 22 & 24 both OK, 0 sim-hash divergence -> UNCAP PURITY: PASS; fix-ON reproduces vanilla hash 770360a2 (sim byte-identical). Fail-on-revert PROVEN: GE007_NO_UNCAP_AUDIO_FIX=1 reddens lvl22 both seeds (fuzz 4c1e45bd/dc61cb8c vs vanilla-stable 770360a2, the finding's recorded bug hashes) -> UNCAP PURITY: FAIL. Sim-integrity ctests sim_state_hash + struct_layout PASS. Opt-out GE007_NO_UNCAP_AUDIO_FIX=1. NOTE: lvl22 is only in the FULL soak, not sense_soak --quick(33/9/24) or the ctest set; recommend pinning uncap_purity_gate 22/24 as a permanent automated lane.
